defaultItems.name: America IPA
defaultItems.description: Dry hopped with a generous amount of Citra, Mosaic and Galaxy hops. Intensely fruity and juicy.

defaultItems.name: Blonde Ale
defaultItems.description: Dry hopped with a single hop variety: Citra. Orange peel and tropical fruit flavors will tickle your tongue.

defaultItems.name: Monopils
defaultItems.description: Refreshing German pilsner with delicate floral and spicy noble hop aromas over a clean malt backbone.

defaultItems.name: NZ Pale Ale
defaultItems.description: Crisp malt backbone and balanced bitterness, delivering a juicy, clean finish that showcases Motueka and Citra hops.

defaultItems.name: Vanilla Gorilla Stout
defaultItems.description: Notes of roasted malt, dark chocolate and coffee, finished with smooth natural Madagascar vanilla beans.

defaultItems.name: Maracuyá Sour
defaultItems.description: Refreshing sour ale with vibrant maracuyá (passion fruit), balanced by tartness and juicy citrus notes.

defaultItems.name: Cas Cider
defaultItems.description: Made with 100% cas fruit, giving it the signature tartness of Costa Rica’s beloved fruit in a cider.

defaultItems.name: Maracuyá Cas Cider
defaultItems.description: We take our Cas Cider and add more maracuyá (passion fruit).
